title: leontodon muelleri subsp. trivialis
intro: Leontodon muelleri subsp. trivialis, also known as the yellow sowthistle or triviale dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues. The health benefits of Leontodon muelleri subsp. trivialis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and support liver health. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea infusions, which can be consumed for their medicinal properties.
